narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive capital expenditure in AI hardware and enterprise software is driving significant momentum in semiconductors and tech.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Strong clinical trial results for weight-loss medications are driving investor interest in the pharmaceutical sector.

narratives.name: Crypto and Meme Volatility
narratives.thesis: Divergent sentiment in speculative assets is driving moves in crypto-related platforms and meme-adjacent stocks.

narratives.name: Financial Sector Resilience
narratives.thesis: Banking and payment stocks are showing strength through buybacks and undervalued services despite macroeconomic headwinds.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising inflation and oil prices are creating a divergence between energy producers and broader equity indices.
